user.title: Add Aquascape Hub
user.description: Find the auth token in the Aquascape web dashboard at smartcontrol.aquascapeinc.com → Device → Device Info.

set_palette.name: Set custom palette
set_palette.description: Activate any RGB color animation on an Aquascape Hub.

set_white_mode.name: Set dedicated white mode
set_white_mode.description: Switch the lights to the dedicated white channel.

set_solid_color.name: Set solid color
set_solid_color.description: Set a solid RGB color (RGB-channel mode).
